_description: Example intent manifest for phoenix-intent. Copy to .phoenix-intent/intent.json and edit.
_rules: goals must have unique ids (kebab-case) — used as per-goal trace directory names
max 5 goals per intent (ceiling; split into multiple intents if more are needed)
depends_on lists goal ids that must be proven complete before this goal starts
every check MUST start RED at baseline — a green check at baseline is a vacuous gate
kind is optional: build | integrate | configure | notify | cron | webhook
intent: Wire the Teams notification into the daily pipeline and verify end-to-end

goals.title: Build the Teams connector module (tests green)
Wire the webhook endpoint key into the pipeline config
Send a test Teams notification and confirm receipt via verify script
